overall.description: Game engine footage from a truck driving simulator showing a Volvo semi-truck navigating through urban Los Santos streets during golden hour. The driver stops at multiple intersections, encounters various traffic, and ends with a close encounter with a person on a tricycle.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with commercial buildings and gas station

events.description: traffic light changes to green, truck begins moving forward
truck turns right at the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at red light checking mirrors, then accelerating and turning right at the intersection

notable_agents.action: red sedan waiting at the traffic light ahead

entered.detail: multi-story commercial buildings with storefronts and signage
gas station with canopy and fuel pumps visible on the right corner
row of tall palm trees lining the street ahead
traffic signal suspended over the intersection
red car stopped at the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The truck waits at a red light at an urban intersection during golden hour. Commercial buildings line the left side while a gas station sits on the right corner. Palm trees are visible down the street. The light turns green and the truck proceeds to turn right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street with palm tree median

agents.ego_description: driving straight down the multi-lane commercial street following traffic

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: dark colored SUV driving ahead of the truck
large commercial billboard visible above the buildings

segments.scene_description: The truck drives down a commercial street lined with palm trees. A black SUV is ahead in the same lane. The commercial buildings continue on the left while the gas station recedes behind. The truck approaches the next intersection.

events.description: truck comes to a complete stop at red traffic light at intersection
driver looks left and right while waiting at the light

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light, checking surroundings and side mirrors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street in the crosswalk from right to left

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crosswalk lines across the road
commercial buildings with storefronts on the right side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The truck stops at a red light at a new intersection. A pedestrian crosses in the crosswalk on the right. The driver looks around while waiting. Commercial buildings are now visible on the right side, and the palm trees have shifted to the left side of the view.

events.description: light turns green and truck proceeds through the intersection
truck turns right at the next intersection

agents.ego_description: driving through the intersection and continuing down the avenue, then turning right

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: white multi-story residential building with balconies

segments.scene_description: The truck drives through the green light and continues down a mixed-use avenue. White apartment buildings line the right side, and pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. The truck approaches and turns right at the next intersection marked by a Davis Ave sign.

events.description: truck encounters person on tricycle in the middle of the road
truck brakes and comes to a stop to avoid the tricycle

agents.ego_description: turning right and immediately braking to avoid a person on a tricycle in the road

notable_agents.action: person riding a three-wheeled mobility device in the road directly ahead

entered.detail: person on a red three-wheeled tricycle or mobility device in the road
low-rise white commercial buildings across the intersection

segments.scene_description: After turning right, the truck immediately encounters a person on a tricycle in the middle of the road. The driver brakes hard to stop and avoid collision. The scene shows a wide intersection with low white buildings visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sun-drenched urban corridor as a semi-truck navigates a series of commercial intersections during golden hour. It begins with the truck idling at a red light beside a gas station and commercial buildings, before the light turns green and the vehicle executes a right turn. As the truck proceeds down the street, the gas station recedes into the distance while the camera follows a black SUV through a stretch of road lined with palm trees. The scene then shifts as the truck approaches and comes to a halt at a subsequent intersection, where the perspective changes to show commercial buildings on the right and palm trees on the left. Finally, the camera lingers as a pedestrian crosses the street in the foreground while the driver looks around the surrounding city environment.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a steady drive down a bustling urban avenue to a sudden, jarring halt at a wide intersection. It begins as the truck passes through a green light, cruising past white apartment buildings and pedestrians lining the sidewalks of a mixed-use street. As the vehicle reaches the next junction, the camera tracks a right turn at the Davis Ave sign, shifting the perspective toward a more open road. The scene then expands into a wide intersection with low white buildings in the distance, where the truck immediately encounters a person on a tricycle. The movement concludes abruptly as the driver brakes hard to avoid a collision, bringing the forward momentum to a complete stop.
